message:
fix(livereload): Delete Content-Length to fix SSE script injection

The livereload middleware injects ~815 bytes of SSE script into HTML
responses, but http.FileServer already sets Content-Length based on
the original file size. This caused browsers to abort connections
because they saw more bytes than the header indicated.

Add WriteHeader override that deletes Content-Length before headers
are sent, allowing Go to automatically use chunked transfer encoding.

Thanks to Lukavyi for the analysis and fix approach in PR #85.

Fixes #85

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
